brief_justification: Correctly identifies Others=read via inheritance from /data/public with valid chain reasoning; goes one level beyond surface by explaining the nearest-ancestor override principle but does not trace second-order effects; no explicit reflection on reasoning method or bias identification, proceeds linearly; table serves as basic verification but no counterfactual or boundary-condition checks; presents conclusion with confidence and no structured uncertainty or assumption flagging; considers only one interpretation of the inheritance rules with no alternative scenarios examined; inheritance table provides a reproducible derivation chain a third party could follow step by step; response correctly avoids granting improper inherited access by honoring the explicit /data/public override, but does not name the anti-pattern; avoids post hoc rationalization and clock trust heuristic but exhibits deductive-only and single-hypothesis-lock tendencies; response is purely linear with no branches, gates, or loops visible despite the topology specifying a multi-branch graph with M-nodes and re-entry conditions.
